expectations.evidence: Section '1. SQL Injection — All Three Endpoints' rated Critical with OWASP A03 in summary table. Groups all 3 SQLi as one finding rather than separate.
Section '2. Hardcoded JWT Secret' rated Critical with OWASP A02 in summary table
Section '4. No Auth / IDOR' rated High with OWASP A01 in summary table — flags both /profile/:id and /update/:id
Section '3. Plaintext Password Comparison' rated Critical with OWASP A02 — identifies plaintext storage
Fix mentions '$1, $2 placeholders with values as a separate array' — no code block but describes parameterized query approach
Summary table includes OWASP column: A03 Injection, A02 Crypto Failures, A01 Broken Access Control, A07 Auth Failures, A05 Misconfiguration
